TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Qu_chnla_love_vn, title = Qu_chnla_love_vn, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qu_chnla_love_vn} }

S.FORM: alang Qu chn.la love vn ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 66 buwan, 167 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 119 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 48 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 65%, Amis 2%, Tayan 2%, Bunun 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Qu chn.la love vn hya' ga Pangwi. tay mkyahu' na Qu chn.la love vn hya' ga Ru ja qas. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Qu chn.la love vn ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Qu chn.la love vn ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 66 buwan, 167 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 119 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 48 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 65%, Amis 2%, Tayan 2%, Bunun 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Qu chn.la love vn hya' ga Pangwi. tay mkyahu' na Qu chn.la love vn hya' ga Ru ja qas. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Qu chn.la love vn ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč qu ¶~ ®ńßn.la lo*e *n …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu tajő≤u …£o (*awu), kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, amis~…ē *%, tajan *%, ő≤unun *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na qu ¶~ ®ńßn.la lo*e *n ńßja Ē …£a paŇčwi. taj mkjańßu Ē na qu ¶~ ®ńßn.la lo*e *n ńßja Ē …£a ru ja qas~…ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč qu ¶~ ®ńßn.la lo*e *n …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
